prestazioni: Engine: Skyactiv-G PY-VPTS 2.5L turbocharged inline-4 (88kW/L specific output) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (64mm inducer, 84mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe (CorkSport) and 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system (Borla Atak for CX-30 Turbo, part #140860).

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with Radium Engineering dual catch can setup (PCV & CCV separation) and a Cobb Tuning Accessport V3 (CX-30 Turbo-specific calibration) for ethanol flex-fuel (E85) support via a Continental ethanol content sensor (part #5WK96627).

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-30 Turbo-specific valving, 80mm stroke) with poly bushings (Whiteline KCA426 for front control arms) and a full chassis brace kit (Cusco Type-RS front strut tower bar + rear subframe brace, part #637 540 A). Front sway bar upgraded to 24mm adjustable (CorkSport, part #000-00-1002) and rear sway bar to 18mm (CorkSport, part #000-00-1003).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Pandem CX-30 widebody kit (PAND-CX30-TURBO) with carbon fiber front splitter (30mm overhang), rear diffuser (20mm ground clearance), and side skirts (15mm extension). Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (300mm chord, 65mm height) in raw carbon fiber with adjustable mounts (0-15 degrees).

Wheels & Tires: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear). Lug nuts: Project Kics R40 (M12x1.5, 45mm length, closed-end).

Exterior Trim: Full dechroming with vinyl wrap (3M Matte Graphite Black, part #191-20) on all chrome trim (grille, window surrounds, badges). Front grille replaced with a custom CNC-machined aluminum mesh (Mazdaspeed Heritage grille, part #MSP-GRL-001) and LED headlight upgrade to Lamin-X HID Projector Lenses (CX-30 Turbo-specific, part #LX-HID-CX30).
